name: Gauntlets of Weapon Expertise
description: These heavy gauntlets grant a +1 competence bonus on all attack rolls. Additionally, once per day as a free action the wearer may designate a specific weapon; for 1 minute, attacks with that weapon deal an additional 1d6 damage.

name: Gloves of the Starry Sky
description: These midnight-blue gloves allow the wearer to cast dancing lights and flare at will (CL 1). Three times per day, the wearer can cast faerie fire (CL 5). Once per day, the wearer can cast starfall (as searing light but deals cold damage, CL 5).

name: Helm of Brilliance
description: This impressive helm is set with 10 diamonds, 20 rubies, 30 fire opals, and 40 opals. When fully charged, the helm grants fire resistance 30, allows the wearer to cast prismatic spray (1/day), daylight (3/day), fireball (3/day at CL 15), and color spray (3/day). The helm loses gems as charges are spent. When all gems are gone, the helm becomes non-magical.

name: Helm of Comprehend Languages and Read Magic
description: This ornate helm grants its wearer the ability to comprehend languages and read magic as continuous effects (as the spells, both at CL 4).

name: Mantle of Spell Resistance
description: This elegant silver-thread mantle grants its wearer spell resistance 21.

name: Mantle of the Fiery Spirit
description: This crimson mantle grants fire resistance 10 as a continuous effect. Three times per day, the wearer can cause the mantle to erupt in flames, dealing 2d6 fire damage to all creatures within 5 feet (DC 16 Reflex half). Once per day, the wearer can cast fire shield (warm shield variant, CL 10).

name: Pearl of Power (1st Level)
description: This lustrous white pearl allows a spellcaster to recall any one spell of 1st level or lower that they have already cast that day. Once used, the pearl must be rested overnight before it can be used again.

name: Pearl of Power (2nd Level)
description: This lustrous pearl allows a spellcaster to recall any one spell of 2nd level or lower that they have already cast that day. Once used, the pearl must be rested overnight before it can be used again.

name: Pearl of Power (3rd Level)
description: This deep lustrous pearl allows a spellcaster to recall any one spell of 3rd level or lower that they have already cast that day. Once used, the pearl must be rested overnight before it can be used again.
